name: devflow
description: Structured plan-dev-review workflow for large development tasks with task state and markdown artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Run large development tasks through plan, dev, and review
interface.longDescription: Coordinate complex software tasks through an explicit plan, implementation, and review workflow with persisted task state and markdown artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use DevFlow to start a tracked implementation task
Resume the active DevFlow task and tell me the next action
